examples: Can't you see he just wants to play the aristocrat?
Further up, I ran into a man dressed like an aristocrat.
His limousine waits in the square below, watched over by pigeons and the bust of a dead aristocrat.
After giving the guards the cigarettes, the aristocrat began arguing with them in Russian.
The faux-aristocrat made like a visiting dignitary, saluting the officer as we crossed the bridge.
